item.title: Update: Persona 5 Morgana Van
item.description: Improved collision to avoid bottoming out

item.title: Update: Murcielago Pursuit
item.description: Improved collision to avoid bottoming out

item.title: Update: Ford Focus 1.8i
item.description: Improved collision to avoid bottoming out

item.title: Update: Team Oreca Viper GTS-R
item.description: Improved collision to avoid bottoming out

item.title: Update: Lamborghini Gallardo
item.description: New carbox, colors, shadow- updated parameters, regenerated hull, and PRM fixes

item.title: Update: Skyline H/T 2000GT-R
item.description: Removed backface culling from steering wheel texture

item.title: Update: Honda CR-X SiR
item.description: New carbox, colors, shadow- updated parameters, regenerated hull, and other tweaks

item.title: Update: Ford F-250 Lowrider
item.description: New carbox, colors, shadow- updated parameters, regenerated hull, and other tweaks

item.title: Update: Toyota bB
item.description: Updated carbox, new color method (colors may vary slightly from before)

item.title: New Release: Carbox 2 & 3
item.description: Slightly improved version of Skarma's?? Carbox- green-screen version also included

item.title: Update: Blitz ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new hull generated

item.title: Update: Tommy Kaira ZZII
item.description: Texture and scale improvements, shadowmap added, new hull generated, utilizes ZZII Pro parameters
